description: Authoritative sources for juriscan-verificador. Any source_url in verificador output whose host does not match one of these domains (or a subdomain thereof) is REJECTED by scripts/agent_io.py validate --agent verificador. Updates to this file are versioned in git — expanding the whitelist is a deliberate decision.
notes: Subdomains are accepted automatically — e.g. 'scon.stj.jus.br' matches any host ending in '.stj.jus.br' OR equal to 'stj.jus.br'.
http vs https is ignored during matching.
IP addresses are never allowed, even if they resolve to a whitelisted domain.
